subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter, which thou hadst sent undated, was received. As time is short [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما که بی تاریخ ارسال نموده بودید رسید چون فرصت نیست
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @predictions and prophecies
